journey.name: 07-reimbursement
journey.description: 报销管理：待报销抽屉项 + 报销/退款对冲。

actions.action: Open the navigation drawer and locate the pending-reimbursement (待报销) entry
Tap the pending-reimbursement entry to open the reimbursement screen
Verify the reimbursement screen renders without crashing
Verify the previously reimbursed 500 expenditure and its reimbursement relationship are reflected correctly (no crash, amounts non-negative)
Navigate back to the home screen
